genre_refs: John C. McRae engraving 'Washington Praying at Valley Forge'; religious-patriotic Americana
description: Designed black-and-white graphic built from the engraving 'George Washington praying at Valley Forge' by John C. McRae (credited in the tweet). The high-contrast image shows a man kneeling with hands clasped in a dark wooded winter setting, a tricorn hat and cape beside him; a small figure watches from behind a rock at left. A bottom banner in an ornate white blackletter serif font reads 'One Nation Under God'.
